トピック.授業外学習2: As a general rule, students will be expected to spend one to two minutes of time outside class preparing for every minute of class time.

教科書/Required texts0:
Marius B. Jansen, "The Making of Modern Japan," (Harvard University Press, 2000), ISBN: 0-674-00991-6
Akira Iriye, "Japan and the Wider World," (Routledge, 1997), ISBN: 978-0582210530
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy and curriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.Asian Studies:1. Understanding and analytical skills regarding international issues: the ability to understand and analyze various regions of the world from different perspectives in the humanities and social sciences.2. Problem-solving skills: the ability to proactively identify problems and solve them based on appropriate methods.3. Intercultural understanding and multicultural coexistence: the ability to be sensitive to different cultures and to coexist with diverse cultures.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading3: 備考　Note Students will be expected to participate in class discussions and may be asked to complete small assignments from time to time. These will factor into the participation grade which is twenty-five percent of the final grade. There will be an in-class midterm test and an in-class exam. These will be worth 35% and 40% of the grade respectively.

name: 【380】Prewar Japanese Diplomatic History／Prewar Japanese Diplomatic History [EN]
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
Students will be expected to participate in class discussions and may be asked to complete small assignments from time to time. These will factor into the participation grade which is twenty-five percent of the final grade. There will be an in-class midterm test and an in-class exam. These will be worth 35% and 40% of the grade respectively.
